prompt: I need to build a color palette for a fintech app. I want to use blue as the primary color. How do I build out the full palette with enough shades?
assertions: Recommends using HSL format with explanation of why
Explains a multi-shade scale (e.g., 50 to 900, or 9 shades) with different use cases for light vs dark shades
Mentions saturation needs adjustment as lightness changes to prevent washed-out shades
Mentions the palette needs more than primary blue: greys and/or semantic colors (danger, success, warning)
